steps.title: Substitute x = 46 into the equation
steps.content: The equation is $y = 0.67x + 2.6$ and we need to find $y$ when $x = 46$. Substitute this value directly into the equation: $$y = 0.67(46) + 2.6$$

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content: Compute $0.67 \times 46 = 30.82$. Then add: $y = 30.82 + 2.6 = 33.42$. The value 33.42 is closest to 33 among the choices. That matches choice A — A is correct.
